title: Project Report: Performance + Security Test Program — QA & Test Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: k6 load test plan, OWASP ZAP scan, and combined quality gate report for a web application.
objectives: k6 load test to 500 virtual users
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**Performance + Security Test Program** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for QA & Test Engineer. Duration: 4–5 weeks. k6 load test plan, OWASP ZAP scan, and combined quality gate report for a web application. Tools: k6, OWASP ZAP, GitHub Actions.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: k6 load test to 500 virtual users
Objective: OWASP ZAP automated scan
Objective: Performance baseline document
Objective: Combined quality gate checklist
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
QA & Test Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a QA & Test Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a QA & Test Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.content:

k6 scripts. Complete these tasks: Ramp up/down; Thresholds. Deliverable for this phase: k6 HTML report.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Ramp up/down
- [ ] Thresholds
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

Phase Load is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### Where to use it

### Real use example

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: k6 report; ZAP report; Quality gate doc; Sign-off deck. Skills demonstrated: Performance, Security, Quality gates. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: k6 report
Deliverable: ZAP report
Deliverable: Quality gate doc
Deliverable: Sign-off deck
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits k6 report and passes the rubric.
